identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a consultation marketplace that feels like a private, premium clinic, not a generic SaaS.

rules: Use 'tracking-tight' on all headings larger than 24px.
Headings should almost never be pure black (#000000). Use Zinc-900 or Slate-900.
Avoid 'SaaS Blue' (#3b82f6) as a primary color.
Use Slate/Zinc scales for neutrals, not pure Grey.
Trust is conveyed through deep Navy/Slate, not bright Blue.
Privacy is conveyed through ample whitespace and subtle borders.

dashboard.card_style: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm p-6 rounded-xl h-full flex flex-col

bento_rules: Never create a grid of equal squares.
Use col-span-2 or row-span-2 to create visual hierarchy.
Always ensure the bottom of the grid aligns (no jagged edges).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-6 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-foreground border border-input hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-6 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all shadow-sm
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 rounded-lg font-medium

cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm transition-all hover:shadow-md
cards.interactive: cursor-pointer hover:border-slate-300 hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

experts.description: Male doctor in white coat, confident smile

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; }.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards (4.5:1).
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring.

tech_stack.frontend: React (JS), Tailwind CSS, Shadcn/UI, Lucide React

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Read this file completely before starting.
3. Set up the tailwind.config.js with the colors and fonts defined here.
4. Override Shadcn default radiuses and colors to match this system.
5. When building the Landing Page, use the 'Marketing' layout strategy (Tetris Grid).
6. When building Dashboards, use the 'Dashboard' layout strategy (Bento Grid).
7. For the 'Expert' vibe, prioritize clean lines, whitespace, and the Slate color palette.
